creator: ue@nathan.ruhr.de
text:
The mt driver and its manpage won't be a part of the upcoming 4.0-RELEASE.
The manpage for the wst tape drive contains a reference to mt(4). This
reference should be removed to avoid confusion with the mt(1) manpage.
A patch to that effect has been included.

How-To-Repeat: 
	N/A
